---
title: "Temp Page"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

<style>
/* ===== 탭 UI ===== */
.tabs {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 30px;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.tabs button {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  font-size: 16px;
  margin: 0 15px;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding-bottom: 5px;
}

/* 현재 선택된 탭 표시 */
.tabs button.active {
  border-bottom: 2px solid black;
}

/* ===== 콘텐츠 영역 ===== */
.tab-content {
  display: none;   /* 기본적으로 숨김 */
  max-width: 800px;
  margin: auto;
}

/* ===== 헤더 ===== */
.header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 40px;
}

/* ===== Publications 스타일 ===== */
.pub-item {
  margin-bottom: 25px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
}

/* (1) 저널 이름 강조 */
.journal {
  font-style: italic;   /* 이탤릭 */
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* (2) 논문 제목 강조 + 링크 */
.title {
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 3px;
}

/* 제목 링크 스타일 */
.title a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: black;
}

/* 마우스 올리면 밑줄 */
.title a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* (3) 저자 이름 (폰트 크기 조절) */
.authors {
  font-size: 0.9em;   /* 작게 */
  color: #555;
  margin-top: 3px;
}
</style>

<script>
// 탭 전환 함수
function showTab(tabId, el) {
  let tabs = document.getElementsByClassName("tab-content");
  let buttons = document.querySelectorAll(".tabs button");

  // 모든 탭 숨김
  for (let i = 0; i < tabs.length; i++) {
    tabs[i].style.display = "none";
  }

  // 버튼 활성화 제거
  buttons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));

  // 선택한 탭만 표시
  document.getElementById(tabId).style.display = "block";

  // 선택된 버튼 강조
  if (el) el.classList.add("active");
}

// 페이지 로드시 Home 탭 자동 표시
window.onload = function() {
  showTab('home', document.querySelector(".tabs button"));
}
</script>

<!-- ===== 탭 메뉴 ===== -->
<div class="tabs">
  <button onclick="showTab('home', this)">Home</button>
  <button onclick="showTab('research', this)">Research</button>
  <button onclick="showTab('publications', this)">Publications</button>
  <button onclick="showTab('news', this)">News</button>
  <button onclick="showTab('links', this)">Links</button>
</div>

<!-- ===== HOME ===== -->
<div id="home" class="tab-content">
<div class="header">

# Hyeongseob Kim

Department of Physics, Ajou University  
Quantum Many-Body   | Flat Band Systems   | Topological Phases

[CV](#) | [Google Scholar](#) | [Email](mailto:your@email.com)

</div>
</div>

<!-- ===== RESEARCH ===== -->
<div id="research" class="tab-content">
<div class="research-item">

## Research

<!-- 🔍 검색창 -->
<input 
  type="text" 
  id="searchBox" 
  placeholder="Search papers..." 
  onkeyup="filterResearch()"
  class="search-box"
/>

<!-- ❗ 검색 결과 없음 메시지 -->
<div id="noResult" style="display:none; color:#888; margin-bottom:20px;">
  No matching papers found.
</div>

<!-- 논문 리스트 -->
<div class="research-item">

  <!-- 제목 -->
  <div class="research-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.24672">The theory of topological-topological flat bands</a>
  </div>

  <!-- 접기/펼치기 -->
  <details class="research-details">
    <summary>Show summary</summary>

  <div class="research-desc">
  temp
  </div>

  </details>

</div>

<div class="research-item">
  <div class="research-title"><a href="#">Topological Phases</a>
  </div>

  <div class="research-desc">Investigation of topological invariants and edge states.
  </div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ===== PUBLICATIONS ===== -->
<div id="publications" class="tab-content">

## Publications

<!-- ===== 2025 ===== -->
<h2 class="year">2025</h2>

<div class="pub-item">

  <!-- (1) 저널 + 링크 -->
  <div class="journal"><a href="https://journals.aps.org/prl/">Physical Review Letters</a>
  </div>

  <!-- (2) 논문 제목 -->
  <div class="title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/xxxx">Another Paper</a>
  </div>

  <!-- (3) 저자 -->
  <div class="authors"><strong>Your Name</strong>, Coauthor
  </div>

</div>

<!-- ===== 2023 ===== -->
<h2 class="year">2023</h2>

<div class="pub-item">

  <div class="journal"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s42005-023-01407-6">Communications Physics 6, 305 (2023)</a>
  </div>

  <div class="title">General construction scheme for geometrically nontrivial flat band models</a>
  </div>

  <div class="authors"><strong>Hyeongseop Kim*</strong>, Chang-geun Oh*, and Jun-Won Rhim†
  </div>

</div>

<!-- ===== NEWS ===== -->
<div id="news" class="tab-content">

## News

- 2026.03 — Paper accepted  
- 2026.02 — Conference talk  

</div>

<!-- ===== LINKS ===== -->
<div id="links" class="tab-content">

## Links

- [Google Scholar](#)
- [GitHub](#)
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org)

</div>

<!-- ===== Search Box ===== -->
<script>
function filterResearch() {
  const input = document.getElementById("searchBox").value.toLowerCase();
  const items = document.querySelectorAll(".research-item");

  let visibleCount = 0;

  items.forEach(item => {
    const title = item.querySelector(".research-title")?.innerText.toLowerCase() || "";
    const desc = item.querySelector(".research-desc")?.innerText.toLowerCase() || "";

    if (title.includes(input) || desc.includes(input)) {
      item.style.display = "block";
      visibleCount++;
    } else {
      item.style.display = "none";
    }
  });

  // ❗ 결과 없으면 전체 복구
  if (visibleCount === 0) {
    items.forEach(item => item.style.display = "block");
  }
}
</script>

<!-- ===== Publication Numbers ===== -->
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const items = document.querySelectorAll(".pub-item");
  const total = items.length;

  items.forEach((item, index) => {
    const journal = item.querySelector(".journal");

    if (journal && !journal.textContent.includes("[")) {
      const number = total - index;
      journal.insertAdjacentText("afterbegin", "[" + number + "] ");
    }
  });
});
</script>
